Package index

All functions

banc.surf banc_neuropil.surf banc_brain_neuropil.surf banc_vnc_neuropil.surf banc_neck_connective.surf banc_brain_neuropils.surf banc_al.surf banc_vnc_neuropils.surf banc_vnc_tracts.surf banc_vnc_nerves.surf banc_hemibrain.surf banc_volumes.df
Simplified tissue and neuropil surfaces for BANC
banc_add_synapses()
Add synapses to neuron objects
banc_all_synapses()
Download BANC automatic synapse detections as a .sqlite file
banc_annotate_backbone_proofread()
Annotate positions as backbone proofread
banc_cave_client()
Low level access to banc's CAVE annotation infrastructure
banc_cave_query()
Query banc tables in the CAVE annotation system
banc_cave_tables() banc_cave_views() banc_edgelist() banc_mitochondria() banc_nuclei() banc_cell_info() banc_proofreading_notes() banc_cell_ids() banc_neck_connective_neurons() banc_peripheral_nerves() banc_backbone_proofread() banc_nt_prediction() banc_version()
Read BANC CAVE-tables, good sources of metadata
banc_cellid_from_segid() banc_segid_from_cellid()
Convert between BANC cell ids and root ids
banc_change_log()
Fetch change log information for one or more neurons
banc_codex_annotations()
Read BANC-FlyWireCodex annotation table
banc_codex_network()
Generate FlyWireCodex network visualization URLs for BANC v626 dataset
banc_codex_search()
Generate FlyWireCodex search URLs for BANC v626 dataset
banc_decapitate()
Subset points to be in the brain or in the VNC
banc_ids()
Return a vector of banc root ids from diverse inputs
banc_influence()
Query BANC all-to-all influence scores
banc_islatest()
Check if a banc root id is up to date
banc_latestid() banc_updateids()
Find the latest id for a banc root id
banc_leaves()
Find the supervoxel identifiers of a banc neuron
banc_lm_links
Pre-minted Spelunker viewer URLs for the BANC light-microscopy receptor library
banc_lm_scene()
Build a BANC Neuroglancer scene with a custom LM image layer
banc_meta()
Query cached BANC meta data
banc_meta_create_cache()
Create or refresh cache of BANC meta information
banc_mirror()
Mirror BANC Connectome Points
banc_mirror_tpsreg
Thin-Plate Spline Registration for Mirroring in BANC Space
banc_nblast_matches()
Read NBLAST match results from CAVE
banc_neuron_comparison_plot()
Compare two neurons from the BANC connectome dataset
banc_neuron_volume()
Calculate neuron volume from CAVE L2 cache
banc_partner_summary() banc_partners()
Summarise the connectivity of BANC neurons
banc_read_l2dp() banc_read_l2skel()
Read L2 skeleton or dotprops for BANC neurons using fafbseg-py
banc_read_neuroglancer_mesh()
Read BANC euroglancer meshes, e.g., ROI meshes
banc_read_neuron_meshes() banc_read_mitochondria_mesh() banc_read_nuclei_mesh()
Read one or more BANC neuron and nuclei meshes
banc_reroot()
Re-root BANC neuron skeleton at soma
banc_rootid()
Find the root identifier of a banc neuron
banc_scene()
Return a sample Neuroglancer scene URL for BANC dataset
banc_set_token()
Set the token to be used to authenticate to banc autosegmentation resources
banc_to_JRC2018F()
Transform Points between BANC Connectome and JRC2018F Template Brain
banc_to_jrc2018f_tpsreg jrc2018f_to_banc_tpsreg jrcvnc2018f_to_banc_tpsreg banc_to_jrcvnc2018f_tpsreg
Thin-Plate Spline Registration from BANC to JRC2018F template brain
banc_upload_mesh()
Upload Mesh to Google Cloud Storage for BANC Neuroglancer
banc_users
User information (name + CAVE ID) for active BANC users
banc_view() banc_side_view() banc_front_view() banc_vnc_view() banc_vnc_side_view() banc_brain_side_view()
Set Default View for BANC EM Dataset
banc_voxdims() banc_nm2raw() banc_raw2nm()
Handle raw and nm calibrated banc coordinates
banc_xyz2id()
Convert xyz locations to root or supervoxel ids
bancsee()
Visualise neurons across multiple Drosophila connectomic datasets in BANC spelunker
banctable_query() banctable_set_token() banctable_login() banctable_update_rows() banctable_move_to_bigdata() franken_meta() banctable_append_rows()
Read and write to the seatable for draft BANC annotations
choose_banc() with_banc()
Choose or (temporarily) use the banc autosegmentation
dr_banc()
Print information about your BANC setup including tokens and python modules
elastix_xform()
Perform Elastix Transform on 3D Points
navis_elastix_xform()
Apply Elastix Transform using Navis
register_banc_coconat()
Use BANC data with coconat for connectivity similarity

Developed by Alexander Bates, Gregory Jefferis.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
